summary: Built FR1-FR5: board.py is now the /gogo:done cockpit. FR1 one-mode action keys with per-class guards (space/enter select ready-to-ship only; v view any card; s ship selection; m ship-merged needs >=2; g go on unfinished/in-progress only; / filter; q cancel) — guard violations show a transient one-line hint, never crash. FR2 schema-v2 intent {schema:2, action, items} written on any action, exit 0 (view/go carry the focused slug; ship/ship-merged carry selected ready-to-ship slugs); cancel=exit 1 no file; error/bad-index=exit 2 one-line stderr (unchanged); normalize_intent() keeps the legacy {"ship":[...]} shape readable as action:ship; --headless gained --action (default ship, back-compat) applying the same guards, --ship still maps items. FR4 live case-insensitive slug+title filter across all columns with header count (n/N), Esc clears, selection survives filtering, cursor re-clamps to visible cards. FR5 --selftest extended to 31 checks (per-class key guards, each action's intent shape, filter narrow/clear/case/title/survival, cursor re-clamp, legacy back-compat parse) all PASS; py_compile OK; pure stdlib, pure ASCII, no bytecode staged. gogo-done SKILL rewritten: intent routing table + relaunch loop (view->gogo-view build by class then relaunch; ship->0.8.0 writer per slug, explicit s skips the merge gate; ship-merged->writer with members[]; go->end loop + pipeline handoff; cancel->stop), proven detached-launch note (tmux new-session -d + attach + wait-for), runtime file renamed ship-result.json->board-intent.json, Inputs/outputs + Return updated; fallback stays ship-focused and just mentions /gogo:view + /gogo:go. Docs synced (commands/done.md, skills/gogo, README, docs/{commands,flow,architecture}) to the cockpit + board-intent.json; command count stays 12; plugin.json 0.8.0->0.9.0. As-built charts: kept the cockpit flow (matches intended) + added an activity state-machine diagram of board.py's key->guard->intent logic; charts/manifest.json validates against charts-manifest.schema.json. The 0.8.0 ship writer and already-shipped .gogo/changelog/ entries were untouched. state.md phase left to the orchestrator.
